PREDICATES:
in_club(x) ::: x is in the club
perform_talent_show(x) ::: x performs in school talent shows often
attend_school_events(x) ::: x attends and is very engaged with school events
student(x) ::: x is a student who attends the school
inactive_disinterested(x) ::: x is inactive and disinterested member of their community
chaperone_dance(x) ::: x chaperones high school dances
young_child_or_teenager(x) ::: x is a young child or teenager
wish_to_further_academics(x) ::: x wishes to further their academic careers and educational opportunities

PREMISES:
forall x (in_club(x) -> (perform_talent_show(x) \/ inactive_disinterested(x)))
forall x (in_club(x) -> (chaperone_dance(x) -> \~student(x)))
forall x (inactive_disinterested(x) -> chaperone_dance(x))
forall x (in_club(x) -> (young_child_or_teenager(x) -> (wish_to_further_academics(x) -> student(x))))
in_club(bonnie)
(attend_school_events(bonnie) /\ student(bonnie)) \/ \~(attend_school_events(bonnie) /\ student(bonnie))

CONCLUSION:
perform_talent_show(bonnie)

in_club(bonnie)

(student(bonnie) \/ inactive_disinterested(bonnie))

steps.formalization:
PREDICATES:
in_club(x) ::: x is in the club
perform_talent_show(x) ::: x performs in school talent shows often
attend_school_events(x) ::: x attends and is very engaged with school events
student(x) ::: x is a student who attends the school
chaperone_dance(x) ::: x chaperones high school dances
inactive_community_member(x) ::: x is an inactive and disinterested member of their community
young_child_or_teenager(x) ::: x is a young child or teenager
wish_academic_career(x) ::: x wishes to further their academic career and educational opportunities

PREMISES:
forall x (in_club(x) -> (perform_talent_show(x) \/ attend_school_events(x)))
forall x (in_club(x) -> (perform_talent_show(x) \/ inactive_community_member(x)))
forall x (chaperone_dance(x) -> not student(x))
forall x (inactive_community_member(x) -> chaperone_dance(x))
forall x (in_club(x) and young_child_or_teenager(x) and wish_academic_career(x) -> student(x))
in_club(bonnie)
(attend_school_events(bonnie) and student(bonnie)) \/ (not attend_school_events(bonnie) and not student(bonnie))

CONCLUSION:
(chaperone_dance(bonnie) \/ perform_talent_show(bonnie)) and (young_child_or_teenager(bonnie) and inactive_community_member(bonnie) and wish_academic_career(bonnie))
